All your environment variables, in one place
Stop struggling with scattered API keys, hacking together home-brewed tools,
and avoiding access controls. Keep your team and servers in sync with Doppler.

Your app, enterprise-ready.
Start selling to enterprise customers with just a few lines of code.
Add Single Sign-On (and more) in minutes instead of months.

Strapi is the leading open-source headless CMS.
It’s 100% JavaScript, fully customizable, and developer-first.

Founded in 2018, OSS Capital is the first and only venture capital platform focused
exclusively on supporting early-stage COSS (commercial open source) startup founders.




My color picker app is on Product Hunt



Just type node.cool to go here. Follow me on Twitter.


Node.js is an open-source, cross-platform, JavaScript runtime for writing servers and command-line tools.


You can now discuss Node.js and ask questions right in this repo.

Official

  • Website
  • Documentation
  • Repositorystars78.9k

Packages

Mad science

  • webtorrentstars23.7k - Streaming torrent client for Node.js and the browser.
  • peerflixstars5.6k - Streaming torrent client.
  • datstars503 - Real-time replication and versioning for data sets.
  • ipfsstars5.4k - Distributed file system that seeks to connect all computing devices with the same system of files.
  • stackgl - Open software ecosystem for WebGL, built on top of browserify and npm.
  • peerwikistars307 - All of Wikipedia on BitTorrent.
  • peercaststars476 - Stream a torrent video to Chromecast.
  • BitcoinJSstars4.2k - Clean, readable, proven Bitcoin library.
  • Bitcorestars4k - Pure and powerful Bitcoin library.
  • PDFKitstars7.2k - PDF generation library.
  • turfstars6k - Modular geospatial processing and analysis engine.
  • webcatstars420 - p2p pipe across the web using WebRTC that uses your GitHub private/public key for authentication.
  • NodeOSstars6.4k - The first operating system powered by npm.
  • YodaOSstars1.1k - AI operating system.
  • Brain.jsstars12k - Machine-learning framework.
  • Pipcookstars1.9k - Front-end algorithm framework to create a machine learning pipeline.
  • Cytoscape.jsstars7.6k - Graph theory (a.k.a. network) modeling and analysis.
  • Kadence - Kademlia distributed hash table.
  • seedshotstars182 - Temporary P2P screenshot sharing from your browser.
  • js-gitstars3.7k - JavaScript implementation of Git.
  • skalestars391 - High performance distributed data processing engine.
  • xlsxstars25.5k - Pure JS Excel spreadsheet reader and writer.
  • isomorphic-gitstars5.7k - Pure JavaScript implementation of Git.

Command-line apps

  • localtunnelstars11.9k - Expose your localhost to the world.
  • svg-term-clistars2.4k - Share terminal sessions via SVG.

Functional programming

  • lodashstars49.3k - Utility library delivering consistency, customization, performance, & extras. A better and faster Underscore.js.
  • immutablestars31k - Immutable data collections.
  • Ramdastars20.7k - Utility library with a focus on flexible functional composition enabled by automatic currying and reversed argument order. Avoids mutating data.
  • Folktalestars1.9k - Suite of libraries for generic functional programming in JavaScript that allows you to write elegant, modular applications with fewer bugs, and more reuse.
  • Moutstars1.2k - Utility library with the biggest difference between other existing solutions is that you can choose to load only the modules/functions that you need, no extra overhead.
  • Bacon.jsstars6.3k - Functional reactive programming.
  • RxJSstars24.7k - Functional reactive library for transforming, composing, and querying various kinds of data.
  • Lazy.jsstars6k - Utility library similar to lodash/Underscore but with lazy evaluation, which can translate to superior performance in many cases.
  • Kefir.jsstars1.7k - Reactive library with focus on high performance and low memory usage.

HTTP

  • gotstars9.4k - Nicer interface to the built-in http module.
  • gh-gotstars155 - Convenience wrapper for got to interact with the GitHub API.
  • axiosstars84.3k - Promise based HTTP client (works in the browser too).
  • wreckstars378 - HTTP Client Utilities.
  • downloadstars1.1k - Download and extract files effortlessly.
  • http-proxystars12.1k - HTTP proxy.
  • superagentstars15.7k - HTTP request library.
  • node-fetchstars6.4k - window.fetch for Node.js.
  • flashheartstars117 - REST client.
  • http-fake-backendstars257 - Build a fake backend by providing the content of JSON files or JavaScript objects through configurable routes.
  • cacheable-requeststars221 - Wrap native HTTP requests with RFC compliant cache support.
  • gotqlstars329 - GraphQL request library built on gotstars9.4k.
  • global-agentstars160 - Global HTTP/HTTPS proxy agent that is configurable using environment variables.
  • smokestars144 - File-based HTTP mock server with recording abilities.

Debugging / Profiling

  • ndbstars10.4k - Improved debugging experience, enabled by Chrome DevTools.

  • debugstars9.5k - Tiny debugging utility.
  • why-is-node-runningstars1.3k - Node.js is running but you don't know why?
  • njsTracestars305 - Instrument and trace your code, see all function calls, arguments, return values, as well as the time spent in each function.
  • vstreamstars56 - Instrumentable streams mix-ins to inspect a pipeline of streams.
  • stackmanstars229 - Enhance an error stacktrace with code excerpts and other goodies.
  • locusstars291 - Starts a REPL at runtime that has access to all variables.

  • swagger-statsstars592 - Trace API calls and monitor API performance, health, and usage metrics.
  • NiMstars170 - Manages DevTools debugging workflow.

Build tools

  • parcelstars38.1k - Blazing fast, zero config web app bundler.

Control flow

  • Promises
    • Bluebirdstars19.6k - Promise library with focus on innovative features and performance.

Streams

  • through2stars1.8k - Tiny wrapper around streams2 Transform to avoid explicit subclassing noise.
  • from2stars124 - Convenience wrapper for ReadableStream, inspired by through2.
  • get-streamstars235 - Get a stream as a string or buffer.
  • into-streamstars171 - Convert a buffer/string/array/object into a stream.
  • duplexifystars175 - Turn a writeable and readable stream into a single streams2 duplex stream.
  • pumpifystars205 - Combine an array of streams into a single duplex stream.
  • peek-streamstars46 - Transform stream that lets you peek the first line before deciding how to parse it.
  • binary-splitstars76 - Newline (or any delimiter) splitter stream.
  • bylinestars301 - Super-simple line-by-line Stream reader.
  • first-chunk-streamstars23 - Transform the first chunk in a stream.
  • pad-streamstars5 - Pad each line in a stream.
  • multistreamstars240 - Combine multiple streams into a single stream.
  • stream-combiner2stars74 - Turn a pipeline into a single stream.
  • readable-streamstars872 - Mirror of Streams2 and Streams3 implementations in core.

Real-time

  • property-validatorstars153 - Easy property validation for Express.
  • schema-inspectorstars484 - JSON API sanitization and validation.
  • ajvstars9.2k - The fastest JSON Schema validator. Supports v5, v6 and v7 proposals.
  • Superstructstars4.9k - Simple and composable way to validate data in JavaScript (and TypeScript).

Parsing

  • remarkstars4.1k - Markdown processor powered by plugins.
  • markdown-itstars11.5k - Markdown parser with 100% CommonMark support, extensions and syntax plugins.
  • parse5stars2.6k - Fast full-featured spec compliant HTML parser.
  • strip-json-commentsstars503 - Strip comments from JSON.
  • strip-css-commentsstars104 - Strip comments from CSS.
  • parse-jsonstars212 - Parse JSON with more helpful errors.
  • URI.jsstars6.1k - URL mutation.
  • PostCSSstars24.5k - CSS parser / stringifier.
  • JSONStreamstars1.8k - Streaming JSON.parse and stringify.
  • neat-csvstars232 - Fast CSV parser. Callback interface for the above.
  • csv-parserstars1.1k - Streaming CSV parser that aims to be faster than everyone else.
  • PEG.jsstars4k - Simple parser generator that produces fast parsers with excellent error reporting.
  • x-raystars5.5k - Web scraping utility.
  • nearleystars2.9k - Simple, fast, powerful parsing for JavaScript.
  • binary-extractstars148 - Extract a value from a buffer of JSON without parsing the whole thing.
  • Stylecowstars146 - Parse, manipulate and convert modern CSS to make it compatible with all browsers. Extensible with plugins.
  • js-yamlstars5k - Very fast YAML parser.
  • xml2jsstars4.3k - XML to JavaScript object converter.
  • Jisonstars3.9k - Friendly JavaScript parser generator. It shares genes with Bison, Yacc and family.
  • google-libphonenumberstars1k - Parse, format, store and validate phone numbers.
  • refstars391 - Read/write structured binary data in Buffers.
  • xlsx-populatestars688 - Read/write Excel XLSX.
  • Chevrotainstars1.6k - Very fast and feature rich parser building toolkit for JavaScript.
  • fast-xml-parserstars1.1k - Validate and parse XML.

Humanize

  • pretty-bytesstars707 - Convert bytes to a human readable string: 1337 → 1.34 kB.
  • pretty-msstars621 - Convert milliseconds to a human readable string: 1337000000 → 15d 11h 23m 20s.
  • msstars3.5k - Tiny millisecond conversion utility.
  • pretty-errorstars1.4k - Errors with less clutter.
  • read-artstars322 - Extract readable content from any page.

Compression

  • yazlstars274 - Zip.
  • yauzlstars546 - Unzip.
  • Archiverstars2.2k - Streaming interface for archive generation, supporting ZIP and TAR.
  • pakostars3.5k - High speed zlib port to pure js (deflate, inflate, gzip).
  • tar-streamstars304 - Streaming tar parser and generator. Also see tar-fsstars303.
  • decompressstars323 - Decompression module with support for tar, tar.gz and zip files out of the box.

Network

  • get-portstars616 - Get an available port.
  • ipifystars200 - Get your public IP address.
  • getmacstars265 - Get the computer MAC address.
  • DHCPstars218 - DHCP client and server.
  • netcatstars322 - Netcat port in pure JS.

Database

  • Drivers
    • PostgreSQLstars9.6k - PostgreSQL client. Pure JavaScript and native libpq bindings.
    • Redisstars9k - Redis client.
    • LevelUPstars3.9k - LevelDB.
    • MySQLstars16.4k - MySQL client.
    • couchdb-nanostars464 - CouchDB client.
    • Aerospikestars187 - Aerospike client.
    • Couchbasestars442 - Couchbase client.
    • MongoDBstars9k - MongoDB driver.
  • ODM / ORM
    • Sequelizestars24.3k - Multi-dialect ORM. Supports PostgreSQL, SQLite, MySQL, and more.
    • Bookshelfstars6.2k - ORM for PostgreSQL, MySQL and SQLite3 in the style of Backbone.js.
    • Massivestars2.5k - PostgreSQL data access tool.
    • Mongoosestars22.6k - Elegant MongoDB object modeling.
    • Waterlinestars5.3k - Datastore-agnostic tool that dramatically simplifies interaction with one or more databases.
    • OpenRecordstars474 - ORM for PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite3 and RESTful datastores. Similar to ActiveRecord.
    • pg-promisestars2.9k - PostgreSQL framework for native SQL using promises.
    • slonikstars2.3k - PostgreSQL client with strict types, detailed logging and assertions.
    • Objection.jsstars6.1k - Lightweight ORM built on the SQL query builder Knex.
    • TypeORMstars24.1k - ORM for PostgreSQL, MariaDB, MySQL, SQLite, and more.
    • MikroORMstars2.9k - TypeScript ORM based on Data Mapper, Unit of Work and Identity Map patterns. Supports MongoDB, PostgreSQL, MySQL and SQLite.
    • Prismastars11k - Modern database access (ORM alternative). Auto-generated and type-safe query builder in TypeScript. Supports PostgreSQL, MySQL & SQLite.
  • Query builder
    • Knexstars14.1k - Query builder for PostgreSQL, MySQL and SQLite3, designed to be flexible, portable, and fun to use.
  • Other
    • NeDBstars12.6k - Embedded persistent database written in JavaScript.
    • Lowdbstars15.3k - Small JavaScript database powered by Lodash.
    • Keyvstars1.5k - Simple key-value storage with support for multiple backends.
    • Finalestars170 - RESTful endpoint generator for your Sequelize models.
    • database-jsstars46 - Wrapper for multiple databases with a JDBC-like connection.
    • Mongo Seedingstars395 - Populate MongoDB databases with JavaScript and JSON files.
    • @databasesstars171 - Query PostgreSQL, MySQL and SQLite3 with plain SQL without risking SQL injection.
    • pg-memstars411 - In-memory PostgreSQL instance for your tests.

Testing

  • AVAstars19k - Futuristic test runner.
  • Mochastars20.5k - Feature-rich test framework making asynchronous testing simple and fun.
  • nycstars4.6k - Code coverage tool built on istanbul that works with subprocesses.
  • tapstars1.8k - TAP test framework.
  • tapestars5.5k - TAP-producing test harness.
  • power-assertstars2.6k - Provides descriptive assertion messages through the standard assert interface.
  • Mochifystars339 - TDD with Browserify, Mocha, PhantomJS and WebDriver.
  • trevorstars2.2k - Run tests against multiple versions of Node.js without switching versions manually or pushing to Travis CI.
  • loadteststars2.1k - Run load tests for your web application, with an API for automation.
  • Sinon.JSstars8.5k - Test spies, stubs and mocks.
  • navitstars44 - PhantomJS / SlimerJS wrapper to simplify browser test scripting.
  • Nockstars10.5k - HTTP mocking and expectations.
  • internstars4.3k - Code testing stack.
  • toxystars2.7k - Hackable HTTP proxy to simulate failure scenarios and network conditions.
  • hook-stdstars47 - Hook and modify stdout/stderr.
  • testenstars177 - Run tests for multiple versions of Node.js locally with NVM.
  • Nightwatchstars10.7k - Automated UI testing framework based on Selenium WebDriver.
  • WebdriverIOstars6.7k - Automated testing based on the WebDriver protocol.
  • Jeststars35.1k - Painless JavaScript testing.
  • TestCafestars8.9k - Automated browser testing.
  • abstrusestars726 - Continuous Integration server.
  • CodeceptJSstars3.4k - End-to-end testing.
  • Puppeteerstars70.5k - Headless Chrome.
  • Playwrightstars23.8k - Headless Chromium, WebKit, and Firefox with a single API.
  • nvestars541 - Run any command on multiple versions of Node.js locally.
  • axe-corestars3.8k - Accessibility engine for automated Web UI testing.
  • testcontainers-nodestars385 - Provides lightweight, throwaway instances of common databases, Selenium web browsers, or anything else that can run in a Docker container.

Security

  • upashstars487 - Unified API for all password hashing algorithms.
  • themisstars1.3k - Multilanguage framework for making typical encryption schemes easy to use: data at rest, authenticated data exchange, transport protection, authentication, and so on.
  • GuardRails - GitHub app that provides security feedback in pull requests.
  • rate-limiter-flexiblestars1.6k - Brute-force and DDoS attack protection.
  • crypto-hashstars507 - Async non-blocking hashing.
  • jose-simplestars42 - Encryption and decryption of data using the JOSE (JSON Object Signing and Encryption) standard.

Benchmarking

  • Benchmark.jsstars4.9k - Benchmarking library that supports high-resolution timers and returns statistically significant results.
  • matchastars544 - Simplistic approach to benchmarking.

Minifiers

  • babilistars4.2k - ES2015+ aware minifier based on the Babel toolchain.
  • UglifyJS2stars11.4k - JavaScript minifier.
  • clean-cssstars3.7k - CSS minifier.
  • minimizestars151 - HTML minifier.
  • imageminstars4.7k - Image minifier.

Authentication

  • Passportstars18.8k - Simple, unobtrusive authentication.
  • Grantstars3.3k - OAuth providers for Express, Koa, Hapi, Fastify, AWS Lambda, Azure, Google Cloud, Vercel, and many more.

Authorization

  • CASLstars3.1k - Isomorphic authorization for UI and API.
  • node-casbinstars1.5k - Authorization library that supports access control models like ACL, RBAC and ABAC.

Email

  • Nodemailerstars13.8k - The fastest way to handle email.
  • emailjsstars1.9k - Send text/HTML emails with attachments to any SMTP server.
  • email-templatesstars3.1k - Create, preview, and send custom email templates.
  • MJMLstars12k - Markup language designed to reduce the pain of creating responsive emails.

Job queues

  • bullstars10.5k - Persistent job and message queue.
  • agendastars7.5k - MongoDB-backed job scheduling.
  • idoitstars55 - Redis-backed job queue engine with advanced job control.
  • node-resquestars988 - Redis-backed job queue.
  • rsmqstars1.5k - Redis-backed message queue.
  • bee-queuestars2.4k - High-performance Redis-backed job queue.
  • RedisSMQstars242 - Simple high-performance Redis message queue with real-time monitoring.
  • sqs-consumerstars1k - Build Amazon Simple Queue Service (SQS) based apps without the boilerplate.
  • better-queuestars333 - Simple and efficient job queue when you cannot use Redis.

Node.js management

  • nstars14.5k - Node.js version management.
  • navestars1.5k - Virtual Environments for Node.js.
  • nodeenvstars1.3k - Node.js virtual environment compatible to Python's virtualenv.
  • nvm for Windowsstars15.9k - Version management for Windows.
  • nodenvstars1.5k - Version manager that is similar to Ruby's rbenv. It supports auto version switching.
  • fnmstars3.9k - Cross-platform Node.js version manager built in Rust.

Natural language processing

  • retextstars2k - An extensible natural language system.
  • francstars3.5k - Detect the language of text.
  • levenstars595 - Measure the difference between two strings using the Levenshtein distance algorithm.
  • naturalstars9.6k - Natural language facility.
  • nlp.jsstars4.4k - Building bots, with entity extraction, sentiment analysis, automatic language identify, and more.

Process management

  • PM2stars34.8k - Advanced Process Manager.
  • nodemonstars22.3k - Monitor for changes in your app and automatically restart the server.
  • node-macstars478 - Run scripts as a native Mac daemon and log to the console app.
  • node-linuxstars391 - Run scripts as native system service and log to syslog.
  • node-windowsstars2.1k - Run scripts as a native Windows service and log to the Event viewer.
  • supervisorstars3.7k - Restart scripts when they crash or restart when a *.js file changes.
  • Phusion Passengerstars4.7k - Friendly process manager that integrates directly into Nginx.

Automation

  • robotjsstars10.1k - Desktop Automation: control the mouse, keyboard and read the screen.
  • nut.jsstars342 - Cross-platform native GUI automation / testing framework with image matching capabilities which integrates with Jest.

AST

  • Acornstars7.2k - Tiny, fast JavaScript parser.
  • babel-parser - JavaScript parser used in Babel.
  • cherow - JavaScript parser with focus on performance and stability.

Static site generators

  • Wintersmithstars3.5k - Flexible, minimalistic, multi-platform static site generator.
  • Assemblestars3.9k - Static site generator for Node.js, Grunt.js, and Yeoman.
  • DocPadstars3k - Static site generator with dynamic abilities and huge plugin ecosystem.
  • Phenomicstars3.3k - Modern static website generator based on the React and Webpack ecosystem.
  • docsifystars17.4k - Markdown documentation site generator with no statically built HTML files.
  • Chargestars372 - Opinionated, zero-config static site generator using JSX and MDX.

Content management systems

  • KeystoneJSstars3.9k - CMS and web application platform built on Express and MongoDB.
  • ApostropheCMSstars3.5k - Content management system with an emphasis on intuitive front end content editing and administration built on Express and MongoDB.
  • Strapistars36.4k - Content Management Framework (headless-CMS) to build powerful APIs.
  • Tipestars2.2k - Developer-first content management system with GraphQL and REST API from a schema file.
  • Factorstars1.2k - Vue.js dashboard framework and headless CMS.
  • AdminBrostars3.6k - Auto-generated admin panel with CRUD for all your resources.

Forum

  • nodeBBstars11.9k - Forum platform for the modern web.

Blogging

  • Ghoststars37.4k - Simple, powerful publishing platform.
  • Hexostars32.7k - Fast, simple and powerful blogging framework.

Weird

  • cowsstars356 - ASCII cows.
  • superbstars364 - Get superb like words.
  • cat-namesstars229 - Get popular cat names.
  • dog-namesstars106 - Get popular dog names.
  • superheroesstars205 - Get superhero names.
  • supervillainsstars99 - Get supervillain names.
  • cool-ascii-facesstars1.7k - Get some cool ascii faces.
  • cat-ascii-facesstars230 - ₍˄·͈༝·͈˄₎◞ ̑̑ෆ⃛ (=ↀωↀ=)✧ (^･o･^)ﾉ”.
  • nerdsstars93 - Get data from nerdy topics like Harry Potter, Star Wars, and Pokémon.

Serialization

  • snappystars462 - Native bindings for Google's Snappy compression library.
  • protobufstars7.5k - Implementation of Protocol Buffers.
  • compactrstars90 - Implementation of the Compactr protocol.

Miscellaneous

  • execastars3.8k - Better child_process.
  • cheeriostars23.7k - Fast, flexible, and lean implementation of core jQuery designed specifically for the server.
  • Electronstars91.7k - Build cross platform desktop apps with web technologies. (You might like awesome-electronstars21.7k)
  • openstars2.3k - Opens stuff like websites, files, executables.
  • hashastars853 - Hashing made simple. Get the hash of a buffer/string/stream/file.
  • dot-propstars525 - Get a property from a nested object using a dot path.
  • onetimestars127 - Only run a function once.
  • memstars742 - Memoize functions - an optimization technique used to speed up consecutive function calls by caching the result of calls with identical input.
  • import-freshstars233 - Import a module while bypassing the cache.
  • strip-bomstars91 - Strip UTF-8 byte order mark (BOM) from a string/buffer/stream.
  • os-localestars176 - Get the system locale.
  • ssh2stars4.4k - SSH2 client and server module.
  • aditstars35 - SSH tunneling made simple.
  • import-lazystars214 - Import a module lazily.
  • file-typestars2k - Detect the file type of a Buffer.
  • Bottleneckstars1.1k - Rate limiter that makes throttling easy.
  • owstars3.1k - Function argument validation for humans.
  • webworker-threadsstars2.2k - Lightweight Web Worker API implementation with native threads.
  • clipboardystars1.2k - Access the system clipboard (copy/paste).
  • node-pre-gypstars881 - Makes it easy to publish and install Node.js C++ addons from binaries.
  • opencvstars4.1k - Bindings for OpenCV. The defacto computer vision library.
  • dotenvstars13.4k - Load environment variables from .env file.
  • remote-git-tagsstars40 - Get tags from a remote git repo.
  • semverstars3.6k - Semantic version parser.
  • Faker.jsstars31.9k - Generate massive amounts of fake data.
  • nodegitstars4.8k - Native bindings to Git.
  • json-strictifystars12 - Safely serialize a value to JSON without data loss or going into an infinite loop.
  • resolve-fromstars115 - Resolve the path of a module like require.resolve() but from a given path.
  • simplecrawlerstars2.1k - Event driven web crawler.
  • jsdomstars15.8k - JavaScript implementation of HTML and the DOM.
  • hypernovastars5.7k - Server-side rendering your JavaScript views.
  • @sindresorhus/isstars1.1k - Type check values.
  • env-dot-propstars29 - Get, set, or delete nested properties of process.env using a dot path.
  • emitterystars1.2k - Simple and modern async event emitter.
  • node-video-libstars269 - Pure JavaScript library for working with MP4 and FLV video files and creating MPEG-TS chunks for HLS streaming.
  • basic-ftpstars455 – FTP/FTPS client.
  • cashifystars334 - Currency conversion.
  • genepistars47 - Automatically generate a native Node.js addon from C++ code.
  • huskystars22.7k - Create Git hook scripts.
  • patch-packagestars5k - Make and preserve fixes to npm dependencies.
  • editlystars2.8k - Declarative video editing API.

Resources

Tutorials

  • Node.js Best Practicesstars65k - Summary and curation of the top-ranked content on Node.js best practices, available in multiple languages.
  • Nodeschool - Learn Node.js with interactive lessons.
  • The Art of Nodestars9.1k - An introduction to Node.js.
  • stream-handbookstars13.6k - How to write Node.js programs with streams.
  • module-best-practicesstars1.4k - Some good practices when writing new npm modules.
  • The Node Way - An entire philosophy of Node.js best practices and guiding principles exists for writing maintainable modules, scalable applications, and code that is actually pleasant to read.
  • You Don't Know Node.jsstars1.3k - Introduction to Node.js core features and asynchronous JavaScript.
  • Portable Node.js guidestars1.2k - Practical guide on how to write portable/cross-platform Node.js code.
  • Build a real web app with no frameworks - A set of video tutorials/livestreams to help you build and deploy a real, live web app using a handful of simple libraries and the core Node.js modules.

Discovery

  • npms - Superb package search with deep analysis of package quality using a myriad of metrics.
  • npm addict - Your daily injection of npm packages.
  • npmcompare.com - Compare and discover npm packages.

Articles

  • Error Handling in Node.js
  • Teach Yourself Node.js in 10 Steps
  • Mastering the filesystem in Node.js
  • Semver: A Primer
  • Semver: Tilde and Caret
  • Why Asynchronous?
  • Understanding the Node.js Event Loop
  • Understanding Object Streams
  • Art of READMEstars5.8k - Learn the art of writing quality READMEs.
  • Using Express to Quickly Build a GraphQL Server

Newsletters

  • Node Weekly - Weekly e-mail round-up of Node.js news and articles.
  • Node Module Of The Week! - Weekly dose of hand picked node modules.

Videos

  • Introduction to Node.js with Ryan Dahl
  • Hands on with Node.js
  • Nodetuts - Series of talks, including TCP & HTTP API servers, async programming, and more.
  • V8 Garbage Collector - Trash talk about the V8 garbage collector.
  • 10 Things I Regret About Node.js by Ryan Dahl - Insightful talk by the creator of Node.js about some of its limitions.
  • Mastering REST APIs in Node.js: Zero-To-Hero - Video course on how to make REST APIs using Node.js.
  • Make a vanilla Node.js REST API - Building a REST API without using a framework like Express.
  • Google I/O 2009 - V8: High Performance JavaScript Engine - The basics of V8 architecture and how it optimizes JavaScript execution.
  • Google I/O 2012 - Breaking the JavaScript Speed Limit with V8 - How V8 optimizes JavaScript execution.
  • Google I/O 2013 - Accelerating Oz with V8: Follow the Yellow Brick Road to JavaScript Performance - How to detect app bottlenecks and optimize performance with V8 knowledge.
  • Node.js Internal Architecture | Ignition, Turbofan, Libuv - How Node.js works internally, with a focus on V8 and libuv.
  • Introduction to libuv: What's a Unicorn Velociraptor? - libuv architecture, thread pool, and event loop, with its source code.
  • libuv Cross platform asynchronous i/o - libuv architecture in detail, such as where it's actually using threads.
  • You Don't Know Node - ForwardJS San Francisco - Explaining Node.js internals with quizzes about V8, libuv, event loop, module, stream, and cluster.

Books

  • Node.js in Action
  • Node.js in Practice
  • Mastering Node
  • Node.js 8 the Right Way
  • Professional Node.js: Building JavaScript Based Scalable Software
  • Practical Node.js: Building Real-World Scalable Web Apps
  • Mixu's Node book
  • Pro Express.js
  • Secure Your Node.js Web Application
  • Express in Action
  • Practical Modern JavaScript
  • Mastering Modular JavaScript
  • Get Programming with Node.js
  • Node.js Cookbook
  • Node.js Design Patterns

Blogs

  • Node.js blog
  • webapplog.com - Blog posts on Node.js and JavaScript from the author of Practical Node.js and Pro Express.js Azat Mardan.

Courses

  • Learn to build apps and APIs with Node.js - Video course by Wes Bos.
  • Real Time Web with Node.js
  • Learn and Understand Node.js

Cheatsheets

  • Express.js
  • Stream FAQsstars187 - Answering common questions about streams, covering pagination, events, and more.
  • Strong Node.jsstars416 - Checklist for source code security analysis of a Node.js web service.

Tools

  • OctoLinker - Chrome extension that linkifies dependencies in package.json, .js, .jsx, .coffee and .md files on GitHub.
  • npm-hub - Chrome extension to display npm dependencies at the bottom of a repo's readme.
  • RunKit - Embed a Node.js environment on any website.
  • github-npm-stats - Chrome extension that displays npm download stats on GitHub.
  • npm semver calculator - Visually explore what versions of a package a semver range matches.
  • CodeSandbox - Online IDE and prototyping.

Community

  • Gitter
  • #node.js on Freenode
  • Stack Overflow
  • Reddit
  • Twitter
  • Hashnode
  • Discord

Miscellaneous

  • nodebots - Robots powered by JavaScript.
  • node-module-boilerplatestars671 - Boilerplate to kickstart creating a node module.
  • modern-nodestars218 - Toolkit for creating node modules with Jest, Prettier, ESLint, and Standard.
  • generator-nmstars710 - Scaffold out a node module.
  • Microsoft Node.js Guidelinesstars2.3k - Tips, tricks, and resources for working with Node.js on Microsoft platforms.
  • Module Requests & Ideasstars505 - Request a JavaScript module you wish existed or get ideas for modules.
  • v8-perfstars1.9k - Notes and resources related to V8 and thus Node.js performance.

Related lists

  • awesome-npmstars3.8k - Resources and tips for using npm.
  • awesome-cross-platform-nodejsstars944 - Resources for writing and testing cross-platform code.
